heading: Operation of branch facilities by minorities and women
label: 2907 Operation of branch facilities by minorities and women
notes: References in TextSection 1204(c)(3) of the Financial Institutions Reform, Recovery and Enforcement Act of 1989, referred to in subsec. (b)(3), is , which is set out as a note under .section 1204(c)(3) of Pub. L. 101–73section 1811 of this title
Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). substituted “may be a factor in determining whether the depository institution is” for “shall be treated as”.Pub. L. 102–550
amendments: Amendments1992—Subsec. (a). substituted “may be a factor in determining whether the depository institution is” for “shall be treated as”.Pub. L. 102–550

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In the case of any depository institution which donates, sells on favorable terms (as determined by the appropriate Federal financial supervisory agency), or makes available on a rent-free basis any branch of such institution which is located in any predominantly minority neighborhood to any minority depository institution or women’s depository institution, the amount of the contribution or the amount of the loss incurred in connection with such activity may be a factor in determining whether the depository institution is meeting the credit needs of the institution’s community for purposes of this chapter.

children.label: A
children.text: more than 50 percent of the ownership or control of which is held by 1 or more minority individuals; and

children.label: B
children.text: more than 50 percent of the net profit or loss of which accrues to 1 or more minority individuals.

children.label: A
children.text: more than 50 percent of the ownership or control of which is held by 1 or more women;

children.label: B
children.text: more than 50 percent of the net profit or loss of which accrues to 1 or more women; and

children.label: C
children.text: a significant percentage of senior management positions of which are held by women.

children.heading: Minority
children.label: 3 Minority
children.text: The term “minority” has the meaning given to such term by section 1204(c)(3) of the Financial Institutions Reform, Recovery and Enforcement Act of 1989.
